title: Environmental and Energy Systems
knowledgeQuestion: Explain the principles involved in this task using examples from your workplace.
skillQuestion: Describe how you completed the work safely, including tools, equipment and checks.
behaviourQuestion: Explain how you demonstrated professional behaviour and worked with others where appropriate.
combinedStatementPrompt: Write around 100 words describing the work completed, preparation, materials, safe working, quality checks, environmental considerations and how any issues were resolved.
